name: Madhur Jaffrey's Lemony Chicken with Fresh Coriander
recipeIngredient: 2 pieces fresh ginger root (1 inch cubes)
recipeInstructions:
1. Coarsely chop the ginger and combine with 1/4 cup water in a blender or food processor. Blend until smooth.
2. Heat oil in a large, heavy-bottomed pan over medium-high heat. When hot, add chicken pieces so they form a single layer. Brown on both sides, then remove with a slotted spoon to a bowl.
3. In the same pan, add garlic and cook until it sizzles. Add ginger paste and stir-fry for 1 minute.
4. Stir in cilantro, jalapeno, cayenne, cumin, coriander, turmeric, and salt. Cook for 1 minute.
5. Return chicken pieces to the pan with any accumulated juices. Add 2/3 cup water and lemon juice. Stir well.
6. Bring mixture to a boil, cover tightly, and reduce heat to low. Simmer for 15 minutes.
7. Turn chicken pieces over, cover again, and continue cooking another 10-15 minutes or until fully tender.
8. If the sauce is too thin, uncover the pan and simmer on medium-high heat until it thickens slightly.
